tasks.name: Design authentication flow
tasks.description: Create sequence diagrams and API contracts for OAuth2 + PKCE login flow. Cover token refresh, session expiry, and multi-device scenarios.
tasks.technicalNotes:
Decided on Authorization Code with PKCE over Implicit Grant per OAuth 2.1 draft.
Session tokens stored in httpOnly cookies, refresh tokens in DB with rotation.
tasks.additionalRequirements: Must support Google and GitHub as identity providers at launch.

tasks.name: Implement login API endpoints
tasks.technicalNotes: Using passport.js with custom strategy wrappers. Refresh token rotation implemented with 7-day sliding window.

tasks.name: Build login UI components
tasks.description: Create LoginPage, OAuthButton, and SessionExpiredModal React components.

tasks.name: Set up CI/CD pipeline
tasks.description: Configure GitHub Actions for lint, test, build, and deploy stages. Include staging and production environments.
tasks.technicalNotes: Using reusable workflows. Docker layer caching cuts build time from 8m to 2m.

tasks.name: Add E2E test stage to pipeline
tasks.description: Integrate Playwright E2E suite into CI. Run against staging after deploy, gate production promotion on pass.

tasks.name: Dashboard page with analytics widgets
tasks.description: Build the main dashboard showing active users, revenue chart, and recent activity feed. Data from /api/analytics endpoints.
tasks.additionalRequirements: Must load in under 2s on 3G. Use skeleton loaders. Charts must be accessible (keyboard nav + screen reader labels).

tasks.name: Implement analytics API
tasks.description: Create /api/analytics/users, /api/analytics/revenue, and /api/analytics/activity endpoints with date range filtering and caching.
tasks.technicalNotes: Redis cache with 5-minute TTL. Materialized views for heavy aggregations refreshed via pg_cron every 15 minutes.

tasks.name: Build chart components
tasks.description: Create LineChart, BarChart, and ActivityFeed reusable components using recharts.

tasks.name: Fix session timeout not redirecting to login
tasks.description: Users see a blank page instead of being redirected to /login when their session expires. Axios interceptor is catching 401 but not triggering navigation.
tasks.technicalNotes: Root cause: the interceptor re-throws after refresh attempt fails, but the global error boundary swallows the redirect. Need to use router.navigate() inside the interceptor instead of throwing.

tasks.name: Revenue chart shows NaN for months with no data
tasks.description: When a month has zero transactions, the API returns null for revenue. The chart component doesn't handle null and renders NaN.

tasks.name: Migrate from moment.js to date-fns
tasks.description: Replace all moment.js usage with date-fns to reduce bundle size. moment.js adds ~300KB to the bundle.

tasks.name: Extract shared API client into package
tasks.description: The axios wrapper is duplicated across 3 services. Extract into @acme/api-client internal package with typed endpoints.
